scope: P2 secondary character reusable character design specs
global_continuity_rules: Grounded eastern epic fantasy; restrained low-magic; worn but readable materials.
P2 characters should be distinct by profession and faction at first glance, without overpowering P1 leads.
Poor or field-worn clothing may be dusty, patched, burned, or repaired, but should not become shredded beggar rags unless explicitly required.
Zhaoming symbols, when visible, use symbol_zhaoming_sunmoon_v03: a moon-white crescent inside a worn golden sun wheel as one fused badge.
Sumin symbols, when visible, use symbol_suming_whitewing_blackhalo_v03: abstract white wings covering a haloed black sun.

characters.name: 罗青禾
characters.role: 37-year-old village medic, Shen Weisang's mother, old relay sign keeper
characters.design_goal: Make her feel like a grounded Canyang Ao healer and the beautiful, resilient 37-year-old emotional source of the escort promise, not a mystic priestess or an old woman.
characters.silhouette: graceful 37-year-old village healer, compact practical layers, protective forward lean when shielding a child or patient, mature beauty without old-woman frailty
characters.face_hair: beautiful 37-year-old mother, warm but resilient eyes, practical concentration, light village-work fatigue but not elderly; hair covered or tied under a blue-green cloth head wrap
characters.wardrobe: plain intact village medic clothing in muted gray and earth brown, blue-green head cloth, patched apron or medicine-house work layer, herb stains and smoke dust
fixed_props: medicine cabinet drawer or plank with hidden relay signs
half Sun-Moon relay token handoff prop
pose_and_expression_anchors: uses herb names as cover for old relay signs
deathbed handoff posture should be intimate and restrained

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with half-body, full-body, protective pose, herb basket close-up, hidden relay sign detail, relay token handoff detail

continuity_locks: must not read as an old woman
head cloth and herb basket must remain
old relay signs should be hidden in ordinary medicine-house material rather than displayed as magic
characters.downstream_usage: Used for episode 01 memory/deathbed references, Canyang Ao medicine-house blocking, and Shen Weisang family continuity.

characters.name: 孟归藏
characters.role: Old Book Society witness and burned archive keeper
characters.design_goal: Make him an ash-damaged witness who protects evidence, not an elegant scholar or generic beggar.
characters.silhouette: thin adult scholar-traveler, hunched protectively around a burned book box, suspicious shoulders and quick hands
characters.face_hair: one burned brow, ash stains, sharp archival eyes, smoke-dried messy hair
characters.wardrobe: dark patched scholar-traveler clothing, scorched sleeve edge, soot-stained travel wrap, paper and bone-clip utility ties
pose_and_expression_anchors: protects pages before people, then regrets it
turns his unburned side toward threat while guarding the book box

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with half-body, full-body, page-guarding pose, burned brow close-up, book box and bone clip detail

continuity_locks: book box and bone clips must remain
burn scars and ash should be specific but not horror-gore
characters.downstream_usage: Used for gray-ash archive witness scenes, exposition about book burning and Qingming identifier history, and prop close-ups of charred documents.

characters.name: 鹿弥
characters.role: northern frost-hoof shaman and disaster-source seeker
characters.design_goal: Make them culturally northern and snow-travel ready, with subtle deer-clan signs instead of a full deer-person fantasy design.
characters.silhouette: slender young adult built for snow travel, alert stance, compact layered cloak, light-footed posture
characters.face_hair: cold-weather marks, wary but not savage expression, braided or tied hair under fur hood
characters.wardrobe: fur-gray and ice-blue northern travel layers, practical snow wraps, weathered cloak, small ritual ties and herb pouches
pose_and_expression_anchors: listens to wind through bone flute
keeps body angled as if reading snow and wind

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with full-body, half-body, flute-listening pose, antler ornament close-up, snow herb pouch detail

continuity_locks: do not over-design into a full deer person
use cultural signs and subtle features
bone flute and short antler ornament must remain
should read as northern disaster-source seeker, not generic forest druid
negative_notes: no full antlers growing from skull
characters.downstream_usage: Used for northern tribe contact, frost-hoof cultural continuity, snowfield blocking, and bone flute prop continuity.

characters.name: 厉螳
characters.role: Mantis military officer of the Armor Army Office
characters.design_goal: Make him the direct physical military threat, clearly separate from Bai Yi's clean bureaucratic Qingming menace.
characters.silhouette: hard angular shoulders, black-green shell shoulder armor, forward-leaning military threat, short spear line cutting across the body
characters.face_hair: severe adult face with partial mantis lines or hard chitin shadow; no calm Qingming mask stillness
characters.wardrobe: black-green shell shoulder armor, dark military cloak, practical command belt, old iron fasteners, field-worn martial layers
marks: mantis blade shadow rather than constant full blade exposure
dark chitin accent lines on armor and face edge
pose_and_expression_anchors: uses direct force and cuts through bureaucracy
occupies doorways and gates like a weapon

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical character sheet with full-body, side view, threat pose, short spear detail, iron gate token close-up, mantis blade shadow study

continuity_locks: distinct from Bai Yi: darker, martial, less clean, more physical
mantis elements are armor and shadow language, not constant exposed giant blades
must not become polished heroic armor
characters.downstream_usage: Used for Armor Army Office pursuit, Hanya Fort control, martial threat boards, and direct confrontation frames.

characters.name: 顾怀章
characters.role: southern teacher and pressure voice for Yan Nanzhi
characters.design_goal: Make him a memory/edict presence who pressures Yan Nanzhi through ritual duty, not a present frontline fighter.
characters.silhouette: upright older ritual scholar, narrow vertical poise, old court discipline, mostly still and frontal as if appearing in memory
characters.face_hair: older adult with controlled severity, tired eyes, restrained southern teacher authority; hair and beard neat but travel-faded or memory-softened
characters.wardrobe: fragmented old imperial ritual robe, aged white layers, worn gold edging, southern red cord scroll case, robe fragment rather than full imperial regalia
pose_and_expression_anchors: appears through memory, letter, or blood-treaty instruction in season 01
holds a scroll like an accusation rather than an ornament

required_image_outputs.layout: vertical memory-reference sheet with half-body, full-body, scroll-instruction pose, robe fragment detail, red cord scroll close-up

continuity_locks: do not overuse as present character unless series route is revised
should read as pressure voice from memory and blood-treaty instruction
old imperial marks should be fragmented and worn, not triumphant regalia
negative_notes: no warm mentor softness dominating the design
characters.downstream_usage: Used for Yan Nanzhi memory inserts, blood-treaty command frames, and southern teacher visual continuity.

lineup_board.purpose: One board comparing the five requested secondary characters so their faction, profession, age, and material language stay distinct.
lineup_board.layout: vertical lineup board with five simplified full-body figures and prop callouts, no readable text labels

assumptions: The user-requested P2 batch includes char_gu_huaizhang_v01 even though the registry currently marks him priority 3.
This is a project-level reusable asset pass, matching existing P1 files, not a detached episode-specific art-room run.
quality_notes: Each character has a stable output path under assets/characters/v01 and prompt traceability.
The batch intentionally avoids new story beats or revised priority metadata in bible/character-visual-locks.json.
